task_completion.description: Verify the Alert Name is set correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Name' in the iDempiere Alert window containing the exact text 'High Value Purchase'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Alert Subject is set correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Alert Subject' containing the exact text 'Review Invoice > 1000'.
Look for a checkbox labeled 'Enforce Client Security' and ensure it is checked/ticked.

task_completion.description: Verify the Alert Rule SQL clause is configured
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text area (likely under an 'Alert Rule' tab or section) containing the SQL statement: SELECT * FROM C_Invoice WHERE IsSOTrx='N' AND DocStatus='CO' AND GrandTotal > 1000.

task_completion.description: Verify the Alert Recipient is set to GardenAdmin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user or contact selection field (likely under an 'Alert Recipient' tab) showing 'GardenAdmin' as the selected recipient.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface with its standard menus, toolbars, and window tabs, rather than a terminal, database client (like pgAdmin), or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the SQL was not just typed into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The SQL clause must be entered into the actual iDempiere application text field, not a notepad, text editor, or standalone browser search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is actually creating or saving a record
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for active iDempiere UI elements like a highlighted 'Save' button, active tabs for 'Alert Rule' and 'Alert Recipient', or a status bar indicating a record was saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The alert must be named 'High Value Purchase' with the subject 'Review Invoice > 1000'. The SQL clause must contain the exact fragments: "IsSOTrx='N'", "DocStatus='CO'", and "GrandTotal > 1000" to correctly filter for completed vendor invoices over $1000. The recipient must be explicitly set to the user 'GardenAdmin'.
